case_title: ANTHONY, LOREE vs. DEEMO ENTERTAINMENT CORPORATION, DBA CHEZ PAREE

docket_entries.description: JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT ORDER GRANTED BY JUDGE GARCIA FILED BY PLAINTIFF ANTHONY, LOREE JUDGMENT OF JAN-24-2000 SET ASIDE
REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ANTHONY, LOREE AS TO DEFENDANT DEEMO ENTERTAINMENT CORPORATION, DBA CHEZ PAREE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ANTHONY, LOREE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DEEMO ENTERTAINMENT CORPORATION, DBA CHEZ PAREE $26,581.50 PRINCIPAL, $94.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $26,675.50
